tone._comment: Tone settings recorded from each machine translation run. Community-contributed locales (da, he, pl, ru, se, sr) predate the machine translation pipeline and have no tone setting.

toneNotes.de: du-form (informal) — appropriate for a technical consumer app (PR #1799)
toneNotes.es: professional — default; no explicit tone specified in PR #1805
toneNotes.fr: professional — default; no explicit tone specified in PR #1807
toneNotes.it: professional — default; no explicit tone specified in PR #1804
toneNotes.ja: professional — default; no explicit tone specified in PR #1806
toneNotes.ko: professional — formal 합쇼체 register appropriate for an IT publication (PR #1812)
toneNotes.pt-BR: informal — você register matching the friendly Brazilian Meshtastic community voice at meshbrasil.com (PR #1808)
toneNotes.zh-Hans: professional — default; no explicit tone specified in PR #1800. Appropriate for mainland Chinese consumer software audience.
toneNotes.zh-Hant: professional — default; no explicit tone specified in PR #1809
toneNotes.zh-Hant-TW: professional — explicitly stated in PR #1803: tone extracted from 745 pre-existing confirmed translations, consistent professional register
